hooks.command: missing=""; which pdftoppm >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }poppler (brew install poppler)"; which node >/dev/null 2>&1 || missing="${missing:+$missing, }Node.js (brew install node)"; if [ -n "$missing" ]; then printf '{"result": "warn", "message": "Talk Builder: missing system dependencies: %s"}' "$missing"; fi
